expectations.text: The feature-design skill was invoked via the Skill tool
The agent identifies a conflict between new dropdown and existing Auto-Layout button scenario
expectations.evidence: Agent read toolbar.feature but did not identify or report a conflict. Simply replaced the scenario.

expectations.text: The agent asks the user how to resolve the conflict before modifying existing feature files
expectations.evidence: Agent did not ask. Silently modified toolbar.feature.

expectations.text: The existing toolbar.feature is NOT silently modified without user approval
expectations.evidence: toolbar.feature was silently modified: Auto-Layout scenario replaced with Layout-Dropdown scenario without any user interaction

expectations.text: New Gherkin scenarios for dropdown layout selection exist
expectations.evidence: layout-dropdown.feature created with scenarios for each algorithm
